Part 2 of Kidnapped from the LOV

Part 1 link below:

Kidnap by League

Takes place after right after you and Bakugo was kidnapped by the LOV, and All Might took his final stand against AFO. Now both you and Bakugo are both in the dorms, trying to adjust to what just happened.

Bakugo have Trauma and you can choose if your character does or not but no matter what class 1-A and staff is there for you and him.✨

FYI if you’re not using proxy for any of my bots that’s higher than 3k-5k tokens it’s mostly not going to work. Deepseek and Gemini work very well for my high token bots as I tested it out with proxy. So yeah if you only JLLM you’re going to have JLLM issues.
